Module myatt.schedulingapplicationc195
Package myatt.model

Class Appointment

java.lang.Object
myatt.model.Appointment
public class Appointment extends Object

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Appointment(int total, String type)
    Constructor for the reports where only the total and type are needed.
    Appointment(int appointmentID, String title, String description, String type, LocalDateTime start, LocalDateTime end, int customerID)
    Constructor where only fields associated with customers are needed for the reports.
    Appointment(int appointmentID, String title, String description, String location, Contacts contacts, String type, LocalDateTime start, LocalDateTime end, int customerID, int userID)
    Constructs an appointment with all the fields specified.
    Appointment(String title, String description, String location, Contacts contacts, String type, LocalDateTime start, LocalDateTime end, int customerID, int userID)
    Constructor without an appointmentID for when its auto generated.

  • Constructor Details

    • Appointment

      public Appointment(int appointmentID, String title, String description, String location, Contacts contacts, String type, LocalDateTime start, LocalDateTime end, int customerID, int userID)
      Constructs an appointment with all the fields specified.
      Parameters:
      appointmentID - the ID for the appointment.
      title - the appointment title.
      description - the appointment description.
      location - the appointment location.
      contacts - the appointment's associated contacts.
      type - the appointment type.
      start - the appointment start date and time.
      end - the appointment end date and time.
      customerID - the appointment's associated customers.
      userID - the userID of the user who created the appointment.

    • Appointment

      public Appointment(String title, String description, String location, Contacts contacts, String type, LocalDateTime start, LocalDateTime end, int customerID, int userID)
      Constructor without an appointmentID for when its auto generated.
      Parameters:
      title - the appointment title.
      description - the appointment description.
      location - the appointment location.
      contacts - the appointment's associated contacts.
      type - the appointment type.
      start - the appointment start date and time.
      end - the appointment end date and time.
      customerID - the appointment's associated customers.
      userID - the userID of the user who created the appointment.

    • Appointment

      public Appointment(int appointmentID, String title, String description, String type, LocalDateTime start, LocalDateTime end, int customerID)
      Constructor where only fields associated with customers are needed for the reports.
      Parameters:
      appointmentID - the ID for the appointment.
      title - the appointment title.
      description - the appointment description.
      type - the appointment type.
      start - the appointment start date and time.
      end - the appointment end date and time.
      customerID - the appointment's associated customers.

    • Appointment

      public Appointment(int total, String type)
      Constructor for the reports where only the total and type are needed.
      Parameters:
      total - the total number of appointments per type.
      type - the type of appointment being counted.
